title: robinia hispida var. fertilis
intro: Robinia hispida var. fertilis is a variety of the black locust tree, also known as the thorny locust, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of rotenone and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Robinia hispida var. fertilis include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although caution should be exercised due to the presence of toxic compounds.
